limitations: Opening and closing observations bracket the interval but cannot prove that mutable public sources did not change transiently between observations.
No passive Level-2 capture was made inside this short evidence interval; checked-in downstream tests use explicitly synthetic captures.
The official market record omits early_close_condition; product terms V2 preserves that absence as null.
The official market record reports an empty rules_secondary string; product terms V2 preserves it without invented text.
The venue supports 0.01-contract quantities, while the current core accepts only exact whole contracts and refuses fractional values.
Fee and settlement identities are retained for compatibility only; neither behavior is calculated or applied.
The NCEI settlement URL is projected from official Kalshi records; third-party NCEI bytes are not retained as Kalshi first-party product evidence.
